rule.title: Account lockout threshold is not configured
rule.check: Verify local account lockout threshold is configured.
rule.remediation: Configure account lockout threshold according to organizational policy.

rule.title: Audit policy does not capture logon events
rule.check: Verify success and failure auditing for logon events.
rule.remediation: Enable audit policy for logon success and failure events.

rule.title: Host firewall is not enabled for all profiles
rule.check: Verify firewall status for domain, private, and public profiles.
rule.remediation: Enable host firewall for all network profiles.

rule.title: Unnecessary service is enabled
rule.check: Verify non-essential services are disabled or documented.
rule.remediation: Disable unnecessary services or document business justification.

rule.title: Volume encryption status is not documented
rule.check: Verify encryption status is captured for protected volumes.
rule.remediation: Document encryption status and remediation plan for unprotected volumes.
